title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — Before you begin
text:
You should be familiar with
PKI certificates and requirements in Kubernetes
.
You should be familiar with how to pass a
configuration
file to the kubeadm commands.
This guide covers the usage of the
openssl
command (used for manual certificate signing,
if you choose that approach), but you can use your preferred tools.
Some of the steps here use
sudo
for administrator access. You can use any equivalent tool.
